title: Adding business cards - monday.com as a CRM
excerpt: Hi all, recently new to Monday.com - trialling it after ditching a different CRM. One thing that seems to be missing is the ability to really use it to save a significant client/contact list. Additional to this is the ab…

posts.author: andrewc (Andrew Crowe)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, recently new to Monday.com - trialling it after ditching a different CRM. One thing that seems to be missing is the ability to really use it to save a significant client/contact list. Additional to this is the ability to quickly and easily add contacts details from business cards. Is anyone else doing this? Without this type of function, it seems we may need to go back to our previous CRM, which isn’t fun. Thanks! Andrew

posts.author: mkeffeler (Miclain Keffeler)
posts.cookedHtml: We are interested in this but having a hard time finding solutions. Anyone out there figure this out?

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mkeffeler !

You can use our app to extra data from Business Cards:

posts.author: msalinas (michele salinas)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you send more information on this process? It looks like you have to take a picture of the business card and then Bitskout will create a contact. Can this be used to create a Lead also?

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Folks - happy to share that we just released Business Card Scanner that is now available in the app marketplace!
You can read more at: Business Card Scanner for monday.com - Deview Studios
